parameters.content:
## Medical Photos HEIC → Google Sheets (v2)

**Architecture:** 3-phase sequential (no nested loops)
1. Collect all files from all client folders
2. Process each file through OpenAI Vision (flat loop)
3. Write results to Sheets per client

**Model:** GPT-4o (OpenAI)
**Rate limit:** 1.5s between OpenAI calls
